request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that investing in civil defense preparedness actually reduces our national security burden? By ensuring communities can handle emergencies, we free up military resources for real threats. Countries like Switzerland prove it works - they spend less on defense overall because their citizens are prepared. Isn't it time we prioritize smart, practical security over endless spending? #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
